where_to_eat.name: Syrian Restaurants
where_to_eat.description: Popular dining establishments run by Syrian refugees in Cairo. These restaurants have become notable community gathering places, though they've recently faced local criticism campaigns.

into_the_wild.name: Manshiyat Naser (Garbage City)
into_the_wild.description: A neighborhood on the edge of Cairo home to the Zabbaleen, around 60,000 Coptic Christians who've been collecting and recycling the city's trash for generations. A unique cultural and socioeconomic experience showing the daily life and work of this community.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Manshiyat Naser Walking Tours
off_the_beaten_path.description: Walking around Manshiyat Naser provides an authentic, off-the-beaten-path experience exploring Cairo's neighborhoods beyond typical tourist attractions and understanding local community life.
